title: Aran

desc: A crane operator ends up in conflict with a gangster over an illegal dockyard business.

desc: Chaos occurs after a simple middle-class family win a new car in a raffle.

desc: A pair of carefree friends plot to change their fate and fortunes.

title: Athidhi
desc: Athidhi tries to hunt down the person who killed his foster parents 14 years ago.

title: Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of popular songs is played in rapid succession.

title: Cinema Enum Bootham
